title: The results of the damage to the refineries in Tuapse and Yaroslavl...
title_en: The results of the damage to the refineries in Tuapse and Yaroslavl...
title_uk: Результати пошкодження нафтопереробних заводів в Туапсе і Ярославлі...
description: The results of the damage to the refineries in Tuapse and Yaroslavl have been clarified ⚡️Yes, as a result of the damage to the oil refinery of the occupiers in the city of Yaroslavl (Russian Federation) on April 26, 2026, damage to the oil vacuum distillation unit has been confirmed. ⚡️In addition, the destruction of 24 and damage to four tanks as a result of the damage on 04/20/2026 in the area of ​​the Tuapsinsky oil refinery in the Krasnodar Territory of the Russian Federation was confirmed. 💪...
description_en: The results of the damage to the refineries in Tuapse and Yaroslavl have been clarified ⚡️Yes, as a result of the damage to the oil refinery of the occupiers in the city of Yaroslavl (Russian Federation) on April 26, 2026, damage to the oil vacuum distillation unit has been confirmed. ⚡️In addition, the destruction of 24 and damage to four tanks as a result of the damage on 04/20/2026 in the area of ​​the Tuapsinsky oil refinery in the Krasnodar Territory of the Russian Federation was confirmed. 💪...
description_uk: Уточнено результати уражень НПЗ у Туапсе і Ярославлі ⚡️Так, в результаті ураження 26.04.2026 нафтопереробного заводу окупантів у місті Ярославль (рф) підтверджено пошкодження установки вакуумної перегонки нафти. ⚡️Окрім того, підтверджено знищення 24 та пошкодження чотирьох резервуарів в результаті ураження 20.04.2026 у районі нафтопереробного заводу "Туапсинський" у Краснодарському краї рф. 💪...

title: The large-scale event "Drone Autonomy 2026", dedicated to modern...
title_en: The large-scale event "Drone Autonomy 2026", dedicated to modern...
description: The large-scale event "Drone Autonomy 2026", dedicated to modern defense technologies, took place last week in Lviv. More than half a thousand participants together with foreign partners gathered under one roof to jointly discuss further steps for the development of their own innovative systems and products. The Deputy Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine took part in the event with a keynote speech...
description_en: The large-scale event "Drone Autonomy 2026", dedicated to modern defense technologies, took place last week in Lviv. More than half a thousand participants together with foreign partners gathered under one roof to jointly discuss further steps for the development of their own innovative systems and products. The Deputy Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine took part in the event with a keynote speech...
description_uk: Масштабний захід "Drone Autonomy 2026”, присвячений сучасним оборонним технологіям, відбувся минулого тижня у Львові Понад півтисячі учасників разом з іноземними партнерами зібралися під одним дахом аби спільно обговорити подальші кроки для розвитку власних інноваційних систем та продуктів. З виступом у форматі keynote-speech участь у заході взяв заступник Головнокомандувача Збройних Сил України...

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: Drones of the company "General Chereshnya" became the leaders in the interception of enemy drones in March. According to the data of the Security and Defense Forces of Ukraine, the drones of "General Chereshnya" ensured 11,473 defeats, which is 5.8 thousand more than in the previous period. The company's assets took first place in terms of the number of destroyed enemy drones. The company is also a confident leader in the number of...
description_en: Drones of the company "General Chereshnya" became the leaders in the interception of enemy drones in March. According to the data of the Security and Defense Forces of Ukraine, the drones of "General Chereshnya" ensured 11,473 defeats, which is 5.8 thousand more than in the previous period. The company's assets took first place in terms of the number of destroyed enemy drones. The company is also a confident leader in the number of...
description_uk: Дроны компании "Генерал Черешня" вышли в лидеры по перехвату вражеских беспилотников в марте По данным подразделений Сил безопасности и обороны Украины, дроны "Генерал Черешня" обеспечили 11 473 поражения, что на 5,8 тысячи больше по сравнению с предыдущим периодом. Средства компании заняли первое место по количеству поражений вражеских дронов. Компания также уверенно лидирует по количеству...

description: Drone strike kills driver near Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant, IAEA says. “Strikes on or near nuclear power plants can endanger nuclear safety and must not take place,” IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi said.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected

description: Moscow, are you sleeping? At the exhibition in Poland, the Ukrainian ballistic missile FP-9 was shown, which will fly for 800-850 km. Next to it is the already known missile FP-7.

title: Kyiv: Ukraine to help Poland build 'modern drone armada,' Polish PM Tusk...
title_en: Kyiv: Ukraine to help Poland build 'modern drone armada,' Polish PM Tusk...

description: Ukraine to help Poland build 'modern drone armada,' Polish PM Tusk says Poland is launching a new project to build a modern drone fleet with the help of Ukrainian technical expertise and European funding, Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk announced on April 27. Tusk said that Poland's new drone fleet will strengthen both Poland's national security and that of its allies.
description_en: Ukraine to help Poland build 'modern drone armada,' Polish PM Tusk says Poland is launching a new project to build a modern drone fleet with the help of Ukrainian technical expertise and European funding, Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk announced on April 27. Tusk said that Poland's new drone fleet will strengthen both Poland's national security and that of its allies.

title: Ukraine spends the largest share of GDP in the world on defense —...
title_en: Ukraine spends the largest share of GDP in the world on defense —...
title_uk: Україна витрачає на оборону найбільшу частку ВВП у світі —...
description: Ukraine spends the largest share of GDP in the world on defense — about 40% — SIPRI According to the Stockholm International Institute for Peace Problems, in 2025 Ukraine spent $84.1 billion on defense. This is the highest figure in the world. The United States ($954 billion), China ($336 billion) and the Russian Federation ($190 billion) spent the most. This is despite the fact that "US expenditures have decreased, since during the year no approval was made...
description_en: Ukraine spends the largest share of GDP in the world on defense — about 40% — SIPRI According to the Stockholm International Institute for Peace Problems, in 2025 Ukraine spent $84.1 billion on defense. This is the highest figure in the world. The United States ($954 billion), China ($336 billion) and the Russian Federation ($190 billion) spent the most. This is despite the fact that "US expenditures have decreased, since during the year no approval was made...
description_uk: Украина тратит на оборону самую большую долю ВВП в мире — около 40%, — SIPRI По данным Стокгольмского международного института проблем мира, в 2025 году Украина направила на оборону $84,1 млрд. Это самый высокий показатель в мире. Больше всего потратили: США ($954 млрд), Китай ($336 млрд) и рф ($190 млрд). Это при том, что «расходы США сократились, поскольку в течение года не было утверждено...

title: 60 missiles launched
title_en: 60 missiles launched
description: Over the past week, the Russian Federation launched about 1,900 attack drones, almost 1,400 guided aerial bombs and about 60 missiles of various types over Ukraine. This underlines the timeliness of the new contributions from the partners to the PURL programme, as well as the approval of the 20th EU sanctions package and the €90 billion European support package in Cyprus. Thanks to all partners who help. Our anti-aircraft system...
description_en: Over the past week, the Russian Federation launched about 1,900 attack drones, almost 1,400 guided aerial bombs and about 60 missiles of various types over Ukraine. This underlines the timeliness of the new contributions from the partners to the PURL programme, as well as the approval of the 20th EU sanctions package and the €90 billion European support package in Cyprus. Thanks to all partners who help. Our anti-aircraft system...
description_uk: Упродовж минулого тижня РФ випустила по Україні близько 1900 ударних дронів, майже 1400 керованих авіаційних бомб і близько 60 ракет різних типів. Це підкреслює, наскільки вчасними є нові внески партнерів до програми PURL, а також схвалення 20-го санкційного пакета ЄС та європейського пакета підтримки в 90 млрд євро на Кіпрі. Дякую всім партнерам, хто допомагає. Наша система протиповітряної...
